title: CPF LIFE
text:
CPF LIFE - SupportGoWhere
CPF LIFE
Share link
CPF Lifelong Income For the Elderly (CPF LIFE) is a national longevity insurance annuity scheme that provides you with monthly payouts no matter how long you live.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Monthly payouts for life
Offers various plans to suit individual preferences and needs
Option to start payouts at a later age up to age 70, where monthly payouts will increase by up to 7% for each year of deferral
Collapse all sections
About this support

Provides a lifelong monthly payout to protect against outliving one’s savings

Unlike private annuity plans, which are subject to investment market returns, CPF LIFE monies are guaranteed by the government and earn a risk-free interest of up to 6% per annum

Offers various plans to suit individual preferences and needs:

Escalating Plan

	

Increasing monthly payouts to help you maintain your lifestyle when prices increase.




Standard Plan

	

Steady monthly payouts even if you may have to keep within a fixed budget and adjust your lifestyle when prices increase.




Basic Plan

	

Payouts that will get progressively lower when balances fall below $60,000. You may have to lower your lifestyle further when prices increase.

Option to start payouts at a later age to receive up to a 7% increase in monthly payout.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident born in 1958 and after, with at least $60,000 in the Retirement Account when you start your monthly payouts, will be automatically included in CPF LIFE

If you are a Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident who is not automatically included in CPF LIFE, you can still choose to join CPF LIFE as long as you are a Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident, anytime from 65 to one month before you reach 80

You can choose to be exempted from CPF LIFE if you have a pension or private annuity plan that pays the same or higher monthly payouts than as CPF LIFE

How to apply?

CPF Board will send you a notification three months before your 65th birthday on the options you have about your CPF savings and how you can make an informed decision using the Plan my monthly payouts service

If you have not instructed the CPF Board regarding your payouts by then, your payouts will automatically start when you turn 70 under the LIFE Standard Plan

Where can I find help?

View more details

CPF Hotline: 1800-227-1188

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 10 Mar 2026
